Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. You are going to get priced out of the best AI coding tools 24 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. The Xkcd thing, now interactive 866 upvotes, 119 comments
  3. Physics Girl: Super-Kamiokande – Imaging the sun by detecting neutrinos [video] 227 upvotes, 33 comments
  4. Simplifying Application Architecture with Modular Design and MIM 18 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Show HN: Open-Source Article 12 Logging Infrastructure for the EU AI Act 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Points on a ring: An interactive walkthrough of a popular math problem 23 upvotes, 2 comments
  7. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 532 upvotes, 152 comments
  8. Simple screw counter 239 upvotes, 66 comments
  9. GPT‑5.3 Instant 19 upvotes, 2 comments
  10. TorchLean: Formalizing Neural Networks in Lean 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  11. Disable Your SSH access accidentally with scp 45 upvotes, 11 comments
  12. Launch HN: Cekura (YC F24) – Testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents 33 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time 1075 upvotes, 517 comments
  14. Show HN: Effective Git 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. Claude's Cycles [pdf] 266 upvotes, 126 comments
  16. I'm losing the SEO battle for my own open source project 289 upvotes, 142 comments
  17. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 1313 upvotes, 739 comments
  18. India's top court angry after junior judge cites fake AI-generated orders 301 upvotes, 159 comments
  19. Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance 221 upvotes, 114 comments
  20. I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services 541 upvotes, 331 comments
  21. Computer Says No 72 upvotes, 34 comments
  22. Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes 536 upvotes, 332 comments
  23. When AI Writes the Software, Who Verifies It? 30 upvotes, 14 comments
  24. Don't become an engineering manager 153 upvotes, 104 comments
  25. Most-read tech publications have lost over half their Google traffic since 2024 148 upvotes, 106 comments
  26. Claude is an Electron App because we've lost native 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  27. MacBook Air with M5 216 upvotes, 193 comments
  28. MacBook Pro with new M5 Pro and M5 Max 419 upvotes, 406 comments
  29. The beauty and terror of modding Windows 75 upvotes, 72 comments
  30. Pass-Through of Tariffs: Evidence from European Wine Imports 51 upvotes, 50 comments
